expertAssessments.rationale: P8 deterministic monitoring evidence and P12 stream/v2 visible text spacing were verified on Vercel production.
Native Playwright MCP profile remained locked, so direct Playwright was used against the real UI without bypassing the chat input/submit path.
GitLab v8.12.43 deploy, AI Engine deploy, and both post-deploy smoke jobs completed successfully.

notes: Native Playwright MCP browser_navigate failed because the shared MCP Chrome profile was locked; direct Playwright Chromium was used as the fallback.
The first combined P8/P12 artifact contains a P12 false-negative from an over-specific echo assertion. The final P12 artifact uses spacing-regression criteria and passed.
P8 response used Streaming AI with monitoring-metric-current and returned DB/cache group averages and per-server rows.
P12 response used /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 and preserved visible word boundaries in the rendered response.
